Title: Imlie
Actors: Sumbul Touqeer, Mayuri Deshmukh, Gashmeer Mahajani
Plot: Imlie is the story about a young girl from the village.Aditya a journalist were forced to marry after found in a hut together. He is engaged to be married but is forced to take Imlie home to keep.her safe. Soon their hearts and lives get entangled in a way that no one sees coming.
